description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a spacious open terrace on the upper level. The exterior is predominantly white with large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The front facade features a balcony with glass railings and potted plants, while the ground floor has a main entryway flanked by tall, narrow shrubs. The house is surrounded by minimal landscaping, including several conical trees and a driveway with parked cars. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open upper terrace. The facade features a balcony, glass railings, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, balcony with glass railings, large windows, and driveway with parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white walls, minimal window openings, and landscaping with conical trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open terrace, fewer windows, and a more private, enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and partial front, with visible terrace, balcony, and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, flanked by tall shrubs, and a balcony above with glass railings.
